notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-st-elevation: ST elevation is a specific finding within acute myocardial infarction and acute coronary syndrome, and is covered by 'acute coronary syndrome'.
notes.sg-myocardial-infarction-st-segment: ST segment is a specific finding within acute myocardial infarction and acute coronary syndrome, and is covered by 'acute coronary syndrome'.
